title: List Navigation
description: A directive that facilitates keyboard navigation within lists. The parent element uses the axListNavigation directive, and each child element uses the axListNavigationItem directive. Supports navigation through list items using Tab, Arrow Down, and Arrow Up keys, with both horizontal and vertical orientations. Features keyboard event handling and focus management for efficient list navigation.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: Basic usage of the list navigation directive with default settings.

sections.title: Orientation
sections.description: Change the navigation direction using the orientation property.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Determines the navigation direction. In vertical mode, Arrow Up/Down navigate between items and Arrow Left navigates to parent. In horizontal mode, Arrow Left/Right navigate between items and Arrow Up navigates to parent.

props.name: activeIndex
props.description: Signal containing the index of the currently active navigation item.

events.name: onNavigationChanged
events.description: Emitted when navigation occurs using arrow keys or Tab.

events.name: onKeypress
events.description: Emitted when any key is pressed on the navigation container.

methods.content:
/**
 * Navigates to a specific navigation item and sets it as active.
 *
 * @param e - The navigation item directive to navigate to
 */
navigateTo(e: AXListNavigationItemDirective): void

props.name: itemElem
props.description: Reference to the DOM element of this navigation item.

props.name: isActive
props.description: Signal indicating whether this item is currently active/focused.

props.name: navigationItemKey
props.description: Unique identifier for this navigation item, automatically generated.

props.name: navigationParentItemKey
props.description: Signal containing the key of the parent navigation item, if any.

props.name: index
props.description: Signal containing the index position of this item within the navigation list.

events.name: onKeypress
events.description: Emitted when any key is pressed on this navigation item.
